basic_details.job_title: Thane Municipal Corporation Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 58 Panel Doctor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Thane Municipal Corporation (Thane Mahangarpalika) has released the Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 notification for 58 specialist doctor (Panel Doctor) vacancies across 15 medical specialities. Eligible and willing medical specialists must appear in person for a walk-in interview on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, 4th Floor, Mahanagar Bhavan, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602. The appointment is on a panel basis for a 3-year contractual period, serving maternity homes and hospitals within the Thane Municipal Corporation area.

qualification.details: To apply for the Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor 2026, candidates must hold the minimum educational qualification listed for the respective speciality as shown in the vacancy table above. All applicants must hold a valid Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate and its renewal certificate. Doctors currently in government service must attach a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their office. | MBBS with relevant postgraduate degree/diploma (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch.) as applicable to the speciality applied for. For Physiotherapist: MPTH or BPTH degree. The minimum qualification listed for each post is the bare minimum - candidates with higher qualifications and local experience will be given preference. | Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate is mandatory for all medical posts. MMC Registration Renewal Certificate must also be submitted. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

vacancy_details.Qualification Required: MBBS, MS OBGY, D.G.O, DNB OBGY
MBBS, MD Anaesthesia, DA DNB Anaesthesia
MBBS, MD Paediatric, DCH DNB Paediatric
MBBS, M.Ch. in Urology or DNB in Urology
MBBS, MS/M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology or D.M. in Medical Oncology

post_wise_breakdown.qualification_required: MBBS, MS OBGY, D.G.O, DNB OBGY
MBBS, MD Anaesthesia, DA DNB Anaesthesia
MBBS, MD Paediatric, DCH DNB Paediatric
MBBS, M.Ch. in Urology or DNB in Urology
MBBS, MS/M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology or D.M. in Medical Oncology

salary_details.general medicine: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit); Fitness Certificate Rs. 1,000/- per patient
salary_details.chest physician: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit)
salary_details.pathologist: Rs. 2,500/- per visit (Two visits per week at required centre)
salary_details.ent: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.psychiatrist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.physiotherapist: Rs. 2,000/- per visit (One visit per week at each required centre)
salary_details.dermatologist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.ophthalmologist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.urologist: Rs. 7,500/- fixed per OPD (minimum 10 patients mandatory); 2 visits per month
salary_details.oncologist: Rs. 7,500/- fixed per OPD (minimum 10 patients mandatory); 2 visits per month
salary_details.cardiologist: Rs. 7,500/- per visit (min. 10 patients); extra Rs. 500/- per 2D ECHO (max 5 per OPD); 2 visits per month
salary_details.details: Panel doctors under the Thane Mahangarpalika are paid on a case-basis or per-visit basis, not a fixed monthly salary. The remuneration varies by speciality, type of procedure (major/minor), and OPD visits per week. OPD charges are calculated at Rs. 100 per patient, with a maximum payment for up to 30 patients per OPD session.

selection_process: The selection process for the Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - there is no written examination. Eligible doctors must present themselves in person with all original documents and attested copies at the designated venue on the walk-in date. The final decision on appointment rests entirely with Thane Municipal Corporation.
Walk-In Interview: Appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office
Thane – 400602. Document Verification: Submit all original certificates and attested copies. Final Selection: Based on qualifications

and interview assessment. Preference is given to doctors with higher qualifications and local/area experience. Empanelment: Selected doctors will be placed on the panel for 3 years for services at maternity homes
and health centres in the Thane Municipal Corporation area.
how_to_apply: There is no online application for the Thane Mahangarpalika Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026. Candidates must download the prescribed application form from the official website, fill it out completely, and bring it on the day of the walk-in interview. Incomplete applications or those submitted without required documents will not be considered.
Download the prescribed application form (Arjachcha Namuna / अर्जाचा नमुना).
Print and fill in the form with all required personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach a passport-size photograph in the space provided on the form.
Attach attested copies of all required documents (see Documents Required section).
Report to: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, Mahanagar Bhavan, 4th Floor, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602.
Reach the venue by 11:00 AM on 03 July 2026 with originals and attested photocopies of all certificates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no traditional last date — the only mode is walk-in interview. Candidates must appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, Thane Mahangarpalika Bhavan.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 58 specialist doctor posts are available across 15 medical specialities including Gynaecology, Anaesthesia, Paediatrics, Radiology, Cardiology, and more.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for Thane TMC Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates are required to submit a filled form with documents — there is no fee payment involved.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold MBBS with a relevant postgraduate degree or diploma (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch.) matching the applied speciality. For Physiotherapist posts, MPTH or BPTH is required. Maharashtra Medical Council registration is mandatory for all medical posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: Panel doctors are not paid a fixed monthly salary. Payment is on a per-visit or per-case basis, ranging from Rs. 500/- per sonography (Radiology) to Rs. 7,500/- per OPD visit (Urologist, Oncologist, Cardiologist). OPD payments are calculated at Rs. 100 per patient with a maximum cap of Rs. 5,000/- per visit for most specialities.

faq.question: Q6. Is the Thane TMC Panel Doctor post permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: This is a contractual panel appointment for 3 years. Being on the panel does not grant any right to permanent employment with Thane Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The venue is: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, 4th Floor, Mahanagar Bhavan, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602.

faq.question: Q8. Is MMC registration mandatory for Thane TMC Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) registration certificate and its renewal certificate are mandatory for all medical specialist posts under this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be paid to doctors attending the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No. The official notification clearly states that no TA/DA (Travelling Allowance or Dearness Allowance) will be paid for attending the walk-in or for services rendered on the panel.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form for Thane TMC Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form (अर्जाचा नमुना) are available at the official website: www.thanecity.gov.in. The notification number is Thane-THAMPA/PRAO/Arogya/23E/2026, dated 24 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no traditional last date — the only mode is walk-in interview. Candidates must appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, Thane Mahangarpalika Bhavan.
